How it works Docs Benchmarks
GitHub
contact

GitHub first. Email later.

SqueezyAgent is pre-v0. The first contact path should stay close to the work: issues, discussions, product feedback, and benchmark questions.

project

GitHub

Follow the implementation, design docs, and release work in the Squeezy repository.

Open GitHub
feedback

Discussions

Roadmap and positioning feedback should live close to the work so decisions stay visible.

GitHub Discussions
security

Security contact

A dedicated security email should be added before public release. Do not route sensitive reports through public issues.

Non-sensitive issues
sq SqueezyAgent

A local static engine helps the agent understand code structure before wasting LLM tokens on search.
